examples: Galactic Suite plans to transport its travelers to space via Russian rockets from a spaceport to be built on a Caribbean island.
Commercial space tourism has taken a step nearer reality with the inauguration of the world's first spaceport in the desert of New Mexico.
The 1, 800-acre Spaceport America site, in Las Cruces, New Mexico, is the home base for Virgin Galactic, Richard Branson's most ambitious business venture yet.
State officials print glossy proposals and fly Lockheed officials in helicopters over the proposed spaceport sites.
This is not the first time Kilgore has proposed tax breaks to benefit the spaceport.
